headlines.title: Learn to build warehouse robots people enjoy working with at the Robotics Summit
headlines.summary: At the Robotics Summit & Expo, Anthony Jules, Robust.AI, will explore what it takes to bring automation into complex warehouse environments.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, insansi robotlarin depo ve lojistik tarafinda gercek saha kullanimina gectigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle automation, robot ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: AES Maximo robot installs 100 megawatts of solar capacity
headlines.summary: Maximo, a robotics startup incubated by energy company AES, has successfully deployed its solar panel installation robots at a site in California.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, robotik uygulamalarin laboratuvar asamasindan cikip gercek operasyonlara daha fazla girdigini gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Robotik gercek dunyaya indiginde verimlilik, uretim yapisi ve is gucu dengesi degisir. Bu sinyal özellikle robot, robotics ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

headlines.title: Card volume rises with digital boost
headlines.summary: Volume on Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover cards issued in the U.S. climbed 6.4% last year over 2024, with an assist from digital plays, according to Nilson Report’s publisher.
headlines.summary_tr: Bu haber, odeme aglari ve stablecoin tarafinda rekabetin sertlestigini ve finans altyapisinda yeni guc dengeleri olustugunu gosteriyor.
headlines.why_it_matters: Odeme ve finans altyapisindaki degisim yeni kazananlari ve islem akisini yeniden kurar. Bu sinyal özellikle mastercard, visa ekseninde öne çıkıyor.

political_items.title: SolarEdge Technologies Expands US Footprint to Power Future Growth
political_items.summary: SEDG expands US manufacturing and boosts solar shipments, but tariff risks and global trade tensions could cloud its growth outlook.
political_items.summary_tr: Bu haber, makro ve jeopolitik tarafta piyasalari etkileyebilecek yeni bir kirilmaya isaret ediyor.

political_items.title: VST Stock: Valuation and Other Factors That Could Move Shares
political_items.summary: Vistra trades below peers despite stronger earnings visibility, with hedging and contracts shaping valuation as investors weigh 2026 guidance and long-term grow

political_items.title: How rescue of US airman in remote part of Iran unfolded
political_items.summary: The operation to extract him from the ground in hostile territory was hugely complex and involved multiple US government agencies.

political_items.title: Trump declares victory after rescue but threats to US operation in Iran still loom
political_items.summary: The rescue could impact how Trump views a ground operation to take Kharg Island or to seize enriched uranium sites.
